title: Kit
description: One jersey design = team + season + kit_type (+ optional player edition). One file per kit under data/kits/<sport>/<league|national>/<team-slug>/<season>-<kit_type>.yaml

team.description: Slug of the owning team (must exist under data/teams/).

season.description: Split season 'YYYY/YY' (e.g. '2024/25') or single year 'YYYY' for tournaments (e.g. '2024').

player_name.description: Only for player-name editions; otherwise null.

manufacturer.description: Brand that makes the jersey, e.g. 'adidas', 'Nike', 'Puma'.

gtins.description: Known GTIN-8/12/13/14 barcodes for this kit (any size/variant). The golden key for matching offers across shops.

source.description: Provenance: 'manufacturer' = submitted/verified by the brand, 'feed' = harvested from a product feed, 'community' = contributed manually.
